components.mpn: Sincere First OV13B10 13MP AF MIPI CSI-2 FPC module (OV13855/OV13850 pin-class alternates)
components.occlusion_risk: medium: needs blackened baffle column in ~6mm air gap to flush window; battery pouch swell vs 0.15mm wall gap; flash crosstalk (see flash)
blockers: vendor z-height + lens-axis + OTP calibration drawing
internal baffle/dust seal design vs flush window
battery swell keepout vs 0.15mm battery-to-wall gap
confirm SoC (Unisoc T606) supports 4-lane CSI-2 at 13MP

components.mpn: Sincere First SF-G5035S60FY (GalaxyCore GC5035 5MP fixed-focus MIPI)
components.occlusion_risk: low: single FF lens, shallow z; black-mask aperture misalignment could vignette
blockers: exact pinout, lens-z, enclosure z-stack, driver support
confirm black-mask aperture vs FOV cone with lens drawing

components.mpn: Lumileds LXCL-PWF1 LUXEON Flash white (1.64x0.90mm, 1000mA) + Awinic AW36515/AW36501 I2C boost driver; OSRAM CEYW / Everlight / MLW alternates; SGM3140 simple driver alt

min_clearances_mm.seat_footprint_mismatch_note: LXCL-PWF1 1.64mm exceeds 1.0mm seat axis; widen seat to ~1.7x1.0 or use 1.0x1.0 OSRAM CEYW-class

components.occlusion_risk: high: flush coplanar flash+camera windows in single back wall couple flash into camera optical path -> lens flare/veiling glare; requires >=6mm spacing + opaque septum + black inter-window mask + walled light-pipe
blockers: reconcile LXCL-PWF1 1.64x0.90 footprint vs 1.0x1.0 seat in CAD
add flash LED + driver IC as explicit BOM lines
confirm >=6mm flash-to-lens spacing actually dimensioned in params (only 'beside camera' today)

components.mpn: Chenghao CH550FH01A-CT 5.5in FHD 1080x1920 LTPS MIPI LCD + on-cell CTP, 40-pin FPC (BOE/Tianma/META 055WU01 alternates)
components.occlusion_risk: low_medium: FPC bend-radius kink at assembly; active-area encroachment into earpiece/front-camera band
blockers: exact pinout + FPC drawing + init sequence
confirm FPC tail length + bend radius vs PCB z-center -2.1mm
